name: functional_health_status
description: Measures the degree to which physical health limits everyday functioning, including moderate physical effort, stair climbing, and reduced activity or work performance due to physical health problems in the past four weeks.

name: subjective_wellbeing
description: Captures self-assessed quality of life, life satisfaction, enjoyment of life, and sexual satisfaction, reflecting the affective and evaluative dimensions of personal wellbeing beyond physical health.

name: healthcare_access_and_utilization
description: Measures the extent to which individuals access and use formal health services when facing a health problem, including institutional affiliation, type of service used, travel time, treatment receipt, and hospitalization.

name: financial_burden_of_healthcare
description: Measures the perceived and actual economic impact of healthcare on individuals and families, including out-of-pocket payments and agreement that medical expenses negatively affect household finances.

name: health_risk_behaviors
description: Captures engagement in behaviors that pose risks to physical health, including tobacco use history, intensity of smoking, and frequency and intensity of alcohol consumption.
